subcodes.first_line: We have enjoined wisdom upon Our servants, lest there occur that which would cause the hearts of creation to be perturbed, and We have lifted the decree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد وصینا العباد بالحکمه لئلا یحدث ما تضطرب به افئده البریه و رفعنا حکم
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @contention and conflict, @suffering and imprisonment
